channel.title: Banking-as-a-Service on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Banking-as-a-Service on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The AI-Enabling Bank: Why Infrastructure Matters More Than Features in the Agentic Era
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why the next competitive edge for banks lies in becoming foundational infrastructure for the agentic AI ecosystem.

item.title: xpanse
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: API-first platform that standardizes and aggregates financial services, allowing developers, banks, and fintechs to launch banking, identity, and payment products with a single integration.

item.title: i2i
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Leveraging a blockchain based automated clearing house and Peso denominated stablecoin, the i2i platform connects rural banks and MSMEs to the national financial grid.
